title: Toni's 3D Leaf Litter
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f37401c44900bb304d117f3f0a2f37696fbca0d9.png)
## 🍂 Toni's 3D Leaf Litter

Bring more depth and realism to your worlds with this pack that turns leaf litter into true 3D textures.  
Each block is redesigned to add natural-looking relief, creating the impression of real layers of fallen leaves on the ground.

Perfect for enhancing forests, paths, autumn biomes, and natural environments with a more immersive and detailed look.

- ✅ Compatible with most texture packs (like [Living Leaf Litter](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/living-leaf-litter))  

---

### 🔗 Looking for a lighter version?
If you prefer thinner, less dense leaf layers, check out the **Lite version** here:  
**➡️ _[Toni's 3D Leaf Litter — Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tonis-3d-leaf-litter-lite)_**
